ddls:
CREATE TABLE "document_cache" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* ID of the origin of the cached document */,
  "type" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "namespace_url" INTEGER /* ID of the namespace URL */,
  "target_url" TEXT /* URL to access the cached document */,
  "is_pattern" INTEGER /* Indicates if the URL is a pattern (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the cached document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cache entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cache entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache entry is currently active (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the cached document in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the cached document for integrity verification */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_cache_namespace_url FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_url") REFERENCES namespace_urls ("namespace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_cache_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_cache_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., presentation, document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "is_searchable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document type supports search (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document type is editable offline (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin entry */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., Google Docs) */,
  "origin_url" TEXT /* Base URL of the origin */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the origin is trusted (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the origin was checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "namespace_urls" (
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each namespace entry */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the namespace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the namespace */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the namespace is public (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "can_cache" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can cache documents (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit documents (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete documents (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cached document being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES document_cache ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document update */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cached document being updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update occurred */,
  "new_target_url" TEXT /* New target URL for the updated document */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major update (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_updates_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES document_cache ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
